name: 16" Fillable Plastic Easter Egg Clear - Spritz™
description:
Add a touch of creativity to your Easter celebrations with the 16" Fillable Plastic Easter Egg Clear - Spritz™. This clear egg is perfect for indoor use and offers ample space for filling with treats or small gifts. Made with 10% post-consumer recycled plastic, it combines fun with a hint of responsibility. Its generous size and clear design make it a delightful centerpiece for your holiday decor.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
